Home/Services/Commercial WiFi

Commercial WiFi

Commercial WiFi for offices, buildings, and shared spaces

Opticable designs, installs, and manages professional WiFi networks for commercial and multi-tenant buildings. Stable signal, properly sized coverage, and the wired infrastructure needed behind the access points, without dead zones or overload, with technical support available.

Request a quoteView all services

Services

Coverage planning, professional access points, maintenance, and support for wireless networks in commercial buildings.

Commercial WiFi

What we install and manage

  • Professional WiFi access points powered by PoE
  • Cat 6 or Cat 6A support cabling from the network room
  • Coverage planning based on walls, materials, usage zones, and bandwidth needs
  • Management and maintenance: monitoring, updates, and coverage expansion
  • Network IT services and wireless administration
  • Post-installation support for adjustments, incidents, and future changes

Infrastructure

Good WiFi starts with good cabling

Most WiFi problems come from the wired infrastructure behind the access points. We handle both the structured cabling and the WiFi layer so the result stays stable over time.

Spaces

Where it fits

  • Open offices and shared workspaces
  • Multi-tenant buildings with common areas and corridors
  • Retail spaces, restaurants, and customer-facing areas
  • Active construction sites
  • Conference rooms and event spaces
  • Warehouses and industrial sites

Process

How the work is handled

  • 01 - Site analysis: square footage, materials, expected users, and actual usage.
  • 02 - Coverage plan: access-point locations, recommended hardware, and required cabling.
  • 03 - Installation and cabling: cable pulls, access-point mounting, network configuration, and signal testing.
  • 04 - Validation, handoff, and support: verified coverage, documented configuration, and ongoing management if needed.

Request a quote

Do you have dead zones or a wireless network that no longer keeps up? Tell us about the space and what it needs to support.

Opticable serves commercial buildings in Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, the North Shore, the Laurentians, and across Quebec.

Request a quote

Services

Related services

Related services that often support the same technology roadmap.

Structured cabling

Cat 5e, Cat 6, Cat 6A, coaxial, patch panels, testing, and documentation for a clean, durable network foundation.

View service

Network infrastructure

Racks, patch panels, technical rooms, internet-entry management, and network support for environments that are easier to operate.

View service

Access control

Readers, locks, panels, door cabling, and ongoing access administration for lobbies, entries, and restricted areas.

View service

Security cameras

IP cameras, PoE, NVRs, remote viewing, and ongoing support to protect sensitive areas, common spaces, perimeters, and entries.

View service

Intercom

Audio or video intercom systems for lobbies, gates, and visitor entries, integrated with access control and the network.

View service

IT services

Device management, network support, maintenance, and technical support for your environment after installation.

View service

Fiber optic

Backbone links, risers, service extensions, and high-capacity fiber runs for commercial buildings.

View service

IP telephony

Business telephony, SIP lines, handsets, VoIP cabling, and network support for commercial offices.

View service

Opticable installs and manages technology systems for commercial buildings in Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, the North Shore, the Laurentians, and across Quebec.
